global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with food images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food delivery with a special sale.

elements.label: Solid yellow background
elements.description: A bright yellow background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'FreshDash' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Food item images
elements.description: Three rectangular images of food items are displayed in the center, showcasing delicious meals behind glass.

elements.label: Food item images
elements.description: Another rectangular image of food is placed next to the first three, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Food item image
elements.description: A smaller rectangular image of a food item is positioned below the main food images, adding variety.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is located in the center, possibly indicating a selection or choice.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15' is prominently displayed in bold, black font.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge at the top right corner reads 'SALE' in white text on a contrasting background.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A bright button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Install now' encourages immediate action.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge at the bottom left corner displays '-30%' in a bold font, indicating a discount.

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: The word 'SALE' is displayed in a bold font at the top of the ad, drawing attention to the promotion.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, FreshDash logo, food images, sale announcement.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, product images in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: FreshDash, Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15, Install now, 30%, SALE
